'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 11''' was the 11th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', published in [[December]] [[1997]].

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]
*[[Second Trooper]]: [[Femi Taylor|The Dancer's Tails]] {{C|by [[Iain Lowson]]}}
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*Role-Playing Round-Up

===Features===
*"[[A New Hope (interview)|A New Hope]]" {{C|by [[Dave Bassom|David Bassom]]}}
*:<small>The beginning of a major interview with [[Irvin Kershner]], the man George Lucas entrusted to direct the first ''Star Wars'' sequel ''The Empire Strikes Back''.</small>
*"[[Roowarragh!]]" {{C|by [[Joe Nazarro]]}}
*:<small>[[Peter Mayhew]], the actor who played [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] in all three ''Star Wars'' films, remembers his contributions to the original trilogy.</small>
*[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]: Wookiees
*:<small>Wookiees — the fearsome and loyal species of which Chewbacca is a prominent member.</small>
*[[The Making of Star Wars (feature)|The Making of ''The Empire Strikes Back'': Striking Back]] {{C|by [[Dan Abnett]]}}
*:<small>Our ongoing production chronicle of the original ''Star Wars'' trilogy enters a new chapter.</small>
*[[Anthony Daniels' Set Diary]]: DP PO'D
*:<small>C-3P0 [sic] actor [[Anthony Daniels]] remembers the trials of life on location during the production of ''[[Star Wars]]''.</small>
*"[[Shadows of the Empire Players Guide|''Shadows of the Empire'' Players Guide]]" {{C|by [[Brian Boyle]]}}
*:<small>We're still putting together the Jedi Knight player's guide we promised last issue - in the meantime here's the first part of a massive guide to this acclaimed PC/N64 game from LucasArts.</small>
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron ½|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' ½]]
*:<small>A special presentation of this one-off ''Rogue Squadron'' story, together with an introduction outlining the history of the acclaimed comic series.</small>
